title: Danthonia provincialis
taxonomy: Danthonia provincialis is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the Poaceae or grass family. It belongs to the subfamily Pooideae and is a member of the tribe Poeae. This species is a perennial grass and is native to Europe. The classification of Danthonia provincialis is further detailed in the following taxonomic ranks: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Poaceae, subfamily Pooideae, tribe Poeae, subtribe Airinae, and genus Danthonia. Within the genus Danthonia, D. provincialis is one of several species of grasses.
